content: Create a black-and-white manga page with 4 stacked horizontal panels, clean black gutters, screentone shading, dramatic speed lines, and polished seinen-style linework. The page features two youthful anime characters with modern casual clothing and short dark hair, with the face area of both characters obscured by a soft square blur censor block. Panel 1: a slim young person with messy short dark hair and a collared shirt clenches one fist near their chest, body angled left, surrounded by an intense fiery aura effect in the background, looking emotional and defensive. On the right side, place a large jagged vertical speech balloon containing this Japanese text: 「何十時間も魂を削って描いた一枚と、プロンプト打ち込んで数秒で出した画像が同じ価値なわけないでしょ！ふざけないで！」. Panel 2: a second young person with slightly taller build, short dark hair, a dark zip jacket over a light shirt, raises one index finger calmly as if explaining a point. Add a rounded rectangular speech box on the right with this Japanese text: 「投下した労働時間で価値が決まるという典型的な“労働価値説の誤謬”だ。市場における価値は、出力された結果を受け手がどう評価するかで決まる」. Panel 3: the taller character gently pats the shorter character on the head; include a small hand-pat sound effect near the hand reading 「ポン」. The shorter character looks up in surprise. On the right side, add a large oval vertical speech balloon with this Japanese text: 「でも俺の市場価値基準はすごくシンプルだよ。君が俺のために照れてくれるこの数秒間に、何十時間分の価値も感じてるから」. Panel 4: close-up of the shorter character blushing intensely with spiral eyes, sweat drops, trembling expression, open mouth, and dense hatching on the cheeks, overwhelmed with embarrassment. Fill the background with dramatic radiating speed lines. Add a large jagged vertical speech balloon on the right with this Japanese text: 「だ、誰がアンタのために照れるか…っ！自意識過剰よ！」. Add two sound effects: a small 「プル…」 near the shoulder and a larger shaky handwritten 「カァァァ」 along the lower left side. Keep the whole page monochrome, highly expressive, romantic-comedy manga tone, with strong emotional contrast between heated argument, cool explanation, teasing affection, and flustered payoff.

content: A cute hand-drawn four-panel comic in a soft, warm, slice-of-life style on a light cream background with thick black panel borders and slightly textured paper grain. Use simple rounded cartoon cat anatomy, expressive faces, clean black outlines, muted natural colors, and a gentle manga-like presentation. In the top-left panel, show 2 cats: a brown tabby cat with dark stripes and white muzzle sitting with eyes closed, looking pleased, while a mostly white cat with dark brown patches on the head stands beside it and affectionately licks the tabby's cheek; add 2 small black musical notes above them to suggest happy grooming. In the top-right panel, show the white-and-brown patched cat in the foreground looking toward a small calico kitten standing to the right; include a speech bubble containing the Japanese text "めい" above the kitten. In the bottom-left panel, show 3 cats together: the brown tabby on the left with a surprised or blank expression, the white patched cat on the right looking cheerful, and the small calico kitten centered in front between them, looking up. In the bottom-right panel, show a close-up of the brown tabby cat alone, facing forward with narrowed yellow-green eyes and an angry, jealous expression; add 2 short emphasis lines near the face and 1 small puff-shaped anger symbol to the right. Keep the tone cozy and comedic, with the visual joke that the tabby was happy being groomed until the new kitten appears. Use flat colors, minimal shading, and a charming Japanese webcomic feel.

content: A dark fantasy matte painting of a bleak hilltop encampment overlooking a vast cursed wasteland at dusk. In the left foreground, a ragged hanging banner reads "The Pale Lodge Outpost" in large black hand-painted letters, attached to wooden poles and weathered by wind. Beside it stands a tall carved totem post topped with a black raven and draped with bones, skulls, and tattered ornaments. The camp itself contains 4 visible canvas tents: 2 large central tents, 1 medium tent on the left, and 1 smaller tent on the right, all in dirty beige fabric with black occult sigils painted on them, held by ropes, spikes, and crooked poles. Around the tents are 5 hooded human figures in dark robes, standing still like sentries or cultists. Near the center-left is a small campfire casting a faint orange glow. In the right foreground sit 2 brass-and-iron astronomical or ritual instruments on stone pedestals, resembling armillary spheres or astrolabes. The ground is uneven black rock at the edge of a cliff, with scattered stakes, lanterns, banners, and ritual posts. Beyond the outpost stretches a desolate valley of ash-colored plains, winding pale waterways, jagged rock spires, and distant mountain silhouettes. On the horizon, slightly right of center, a sinister dark castle rises from a lone hill. The sky is filled with enormous turbulent storm clouds, with 3 flying creatures or birds silhouetted in the distance and a break in the clouds casting cold, sickly light across the landscape. Use a grim, painterly, highly detailed style with muted sepia, charcoal, umber, and gray tones, dramatic atmospheric perspective, cinematic composition, and the mood of a foreboding fantasy frontier outpost at the edge of a dead world.

content: A dark monochrome manga-style horror illustration on a pure black background, in a tall vertical poster composition. Centered at the bottom is a small lonely teenage boy with messy short dark hair, sitting on the ground with his knees pulled to his chest and his arms wrapped around them, head slightly bowed, conveying fear, isolation, and helplessness. Towering over him is a gigantic biomechanical demon or armored monster head descending from above, with a long angular skull-like face, sharp chin, narrow hollow eye sockets, layered helmet-like plates, and a jagged open mouth. Surrounding the boy are exactly 2 enormous skeletal clawed hands, one on the left and one on the right, framing him like a cage; each hand has long segmented metallic fingers ending in sharp pointed tips, bent inward menacingly. Render everything in rough scratchy white ink linework and heavy crosshatching against deep black, with intense high-contrast seinen manga energy. Add vivid neon purple paint-like liquid in splashes and long dripping streaks from the monster’s face, the hands, and the ground, pooling around the boy for the only strong color accent. On the upper right side, add vertical Japanese text reading 逃げちゃダメだ, and beneath it in small white English text: EGO BORDER: ACTIVE. The mood is oppressive, psychological, claustrophobic, and nightmarish, like a dark anime poster about inner fear and mental collapse.

content: Create a bright pastel anime promotional poster for a fictional slice-of-life comedy series. The composition is a single-page Japanese key visual with one central heroine surrounded by 5 inset moments and blocks of Japanese promotional text, like an anime announcement poster. The main character is {argument name="character name" default="もち子さん"}, a cute anime girl with short white hair fading slightly to silver, large vivid blue eyes, soft blush, and twin low ponytails tied near the shoulders. She wears an oversized black hood shaped like floppy dog ears, round silver goggles resting on top of her head, a black choker with a metallic round ornament, a futuristic white-and-black cropped sleeveless top with dark trim and a small emblem on the chest, detached black arm sleeves, very short white shorts with black edging, a thigh strap on one leg, and a small side pouch on her hip. Her body proportions are youthful anime stylization with a slim, petite build and slightly exaggerated chest, rendered in polished modern moe character design. In the center she stands full body, smiling gently and holding a pen in one hand as if she is about to make a mistake while writing, facing the viewer in a confident but sweet pose. Around her place 5 supporting vignette images of the same character: 1) upper left, a chibi-style scene of her outside with both hands thrown forward, crying dramatically with a huge open mouth; 2) lower left, a comic scene of her collapsed face-down on a desk or floor with scattered papers, exhausted and flustered; 3) upper right, a bust shot where she holds up a paper sign with Japanese writing, looking apologetic; 4) lower right, a cheerful half-body portrait with closed smiling eyes and one fist raised in encouragement; 5) a small background portrait in the top-right area behind text, used like a character callout. Include exactly 2 small white mascot creatures near the bottom center, both round and mochi-like with tiny dot eyes and tiny mouths, one larger and one smaller, floating or standing beside the heroine. Use a soft spring palette with pink, sky blue, mint green, peach, cream, and white, with scattered cherry blossom petals and rounded graphic shapes in the background. The background should feel airy and celebratory, with subtle outdoor scenery blur and decorative swooshes, stars, and bubbles. Fill the poster with Japanese typography in a playful commercial-anime style: a large multicolored title at top left, small header text above it, a red seasonal broadcast announcement, a pink "あらすじ" synopsis box on the left with several lines of body text, a blue explanatory box at bottom left, vertical and angled exclamatory phrases around the character, and a pink production-credit block at bottom right. Add a prominent character name banner in the upper right. Keep all text looking like authentic printed Japanese promotional copy, using rounded colorful fonts for the title and clean magazine-style fonts for the smaller text. Overall mood: adorable, comedic, slightly chaotic, professionally designed anime key art for a new TV series announcement in 16:9 landscape format.

content: A cinematic fantasy scene inside a rocky cave during a blizzard, viewed from slightly above campfire level, with 8 characters seated in a circle around a small fire. Outside the cave mouth, a colossal dark mountain rises in the snowstorm, shaped like a sinister pyramid or volcanic fortress, split with glowing crimson-magenta fissures and crowned by a branching, ember-like red energy bloom at the summit; a ring of lava or fire glows at its base across the frozen landscape. The cave interior is warm, amber, and intimate, lit by the fire and a single ornate oil lamp on the right, contrasting with the cold blue-gray storm outside. The group should feel like a high-fantasy adventuring party resting together: 1 regal bird-like humanoid on the left with white feathers, a hooked beak, braided plumage, and layered tribal jewelry; 1 red-haired woman in the left foreground with long braided hair and ornate fantasy garments; 1 young elf-like traveler in blue sitting left of center; 1 small blond elf-like girl at center with pointed ears and clasped hands; 1 elderly king-like man on the right with long white hair, full beard, crown, and dark green robe with gold ornamentation; 1 elegant blond noblewoman beside him in embroidered formal dress; 1 white-haired figure in the foreground right seen mostly from behind in feathered or fur-trimmed clothing; and 1 blue-skinned aquatic-looking woman on the far right with a fin-like headdress, elaborate jewelry, and a cup in hand. Include cups, bowls, plates, bedrolls, sacks, and travel gear scattered around the cave edges. The composition should frame the terrifying glowing mountain through the cave opening behind the party, emphasizing the contrast between sheltered companionship and looming apocalyptic danger. Ultra-detailed textures, realistic fabric and skin, dramatic volumetric firelight, snow streaks driven by wind, moody dark fantasy color grading, painterly realism, epic film still atmosphere, high contrast, rich shadows, masterpiece quality.

content: A dynamic anime-style low-angle illustration of two young women in rabbit-themed bodysuits, viewed from below as if the camera is tilted upward and they are looking slightly down toward the viewer. The left girl has {argument name="hair color" default="blonde"} hair in short twin pigtails with curled ends, large red bunny ears, and a glossy bright red high-cut bodysuit with puff sleeves, long opera gloves, a sweetheart-shaped chest panel, and 4 round silver button-like discs on the front. The right girl has long straight brown hair, pale bunny ears, and a glossy white and pale pink version of the same bodysuit design, also with puff sleeves, long gloves, sweetheart chest panel, and 4 round silver discs. Both have slim builds, long legs, expressive wide anime eyes, and mildly surprised, curious expressions as they glance toward each other and slightly toward the viewer. Their hands hang loosely at their sides, almost touching in the center. Place them in front of a vast ruined cathedral or decayed grand stone building with broken arches, skeletal metal framework, shattered windows, and crumbling debris, rendered as a soft-painted anime background. Use a dramatic Dutch angle and strong perspective so the architecture leans with the camera tilt and the characters feel towering and close to the lens. Bright blue sky with large white clouds behind the ruins. Clean cel shading on the characters, painterly detailed background, crisp line art, vibrant but slightly weathered color palette, cinematic composition. Add 3 text elements in the upper right area as graphic design overlay: small uppercase text "ARINKO AGENTS", large bold Japanese text "平和島", and a large white handwritten signature-like script overlapping the background.

content: A dark, cinematic anime-horror key visual in a vertical poster composition, set at night inside or beside a shattered window with a huge glowing full moon dominating the background. In the center foreground, a young couple stands in an intimate embrace. The male figure is tall and slim, wearing a dark brown or charcoal hoodie with the hood up, white drawstrings, subtle red blood-like stains on the sleeve and lower hem, and dark red pants. His skin is pale, his long black hair falls over one eye, and the lower half of his face is wrapped in dirty white bandages stained with blood, giving him a disturbing but protective antihero presence. One hand and wrist are also wrapped in bandages. He looks slightly upward and away with a solemn, haunted expression while holding the girl around her back. The female figure is petite with extremely long straight platinum-blonde hair reaching past her waist, wearing a loose white coat or cardigan over a black-and-white outfit and a black choker. She faces him closely with both hands clasped together against his chest, creating a tender contrast against the horror atmosphere. Add 2 ghostly supporting figures in the background: on the left, a pale blonde girl in shadow wearing striped clothing and holding an object close to her chest; on the right, a hooded male figure in profile with glasses or sharp facial lines, his hood marked by a dark blood stain. The environment is filled with floating shards of broken glass, blue moonlight, dust motes, and star-like particles, with deep navy, black, and icy blue tones throughout. Place a stylized red Japanese title at the top right, {argument name="headline text" default="殺戮の天使"}, with a smaller red serif English subtitle beneath it reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="Memory Collection"}. content: A highly detailed anime-style illustration of a pale goth girl in a colorful urban playground, shown in a close medium shot as she leans forward and bites a horizontal metal bar with a mischievous, slightly defiant expression. She has long straight {argument name="hair color" default="jet black"} hair with blunt bangs, vivid red eyes, and a delicate face with a small mouth partly pressed against the bar. Her hair is decorated with 3 geometric hair clips on the right side: 1 red triangle clip, 1 blue angular clip, and 1 small gold ring clip. She wears multiple ear piercings including several studs and dangling industrial-style earrings. Her outfit is a black techwear-goth ensemble with 5 visible key pieces: 1 cropped black jacket with red and blue accent stripes, 1 black choker, 1 strappy black top or dress with front buckles, 1 wide black belt with metal hardware, and 1 hanging waist chain. Her sleeves are long and oversized, with white stripe details on one forearm. Both hands grip the bar, one near her mouth and one farther to the side, creating an intimate confrontational pose. The setting is a playground with bright primary-colored equipment: blue posts, red connectors, yellow and red climbing bars, and a patterned rubber floor made of bold geometric blocks in blue, red, yellow, white, and black. In the background are dark green trees and a dramatic graphic sky with large flat shapes in red, orange, blue, black, and white, plus circular sun-like dots, giving the whole scene a posterized pop-art look. Include 1 vertical warning sticker on the left blue post with Japanese text and a small caution icon. Use crisp cel shading, sharp linework, slight glitchy texture accents, ultra-saturated colors, high contrast, a moody cyber-goth fashion vibe, and a dynamic composition centered on the girl's intense gaze and the metal bar.

content: A dynamic anime action illustration of two young martial-arts women fighting inside a traditional Japanese-style wooden dojo. The left fighter is in the foreground, a black-haired girl with a neat bun tied by a yellow ribbon, wearing a sleeveless yellow Chinese kung fu tunic with black trim, loose black pants, and black cloth shoes. She is in a deep low stance on the wooden floor, one fist pulled back and the other punching forward, surrounded by bright red energy trails that arc around her body and sweep across the scene. Water splashes dramatically around her feet as if her movement skims through a shallow layer of water. The right fighter is airborne in the midground, a pale-skinned girl with light lavender hair in two round buns, wearing a short black-and-white cheongsam-inspired battle dress with gold trim, black sheer tights, and black shoes. She performs a flying side kick while a vivid blue energy spiral curls around her in a circular motion. The collision of force between them has cracked and exploded the wooden floor at center-right, with debris and wood fragments flying outward, while dust and smoke billow across the lower right corner. The dojo interior has exposed timber beams, tatami edging, shoji-style windows, and warm natural light entering from the left. Hang a wooden sign above them with the Chinese text {argument name="sign text" default="币安 vs OKX"}. Use a dramatic wide-angle composition, strong foreshortening, cinematic motion blur, intense speed lines, high-detail anime rendering, glossy highlights, clean line art, energetic combat choreography, and a polished poster-like finish. Add exactly 2 visible fighters, 1 overhead wooden sign, 1 cracked floor impact point, 1 red energy effect around the left fighter, and 1 blue energy effect around the right fighter. Optionally place a subtle watermark-like text at the lower right reading {argument name="watermark text" default="UM YouMind"}.

She has {argument name="hair color" default="light purple"} hair styled in two buns with trailing strands and ornate gold hair ornaments. She wears a dark green Chinese-style dress with gold embroidery, black stockings, and dark shoes. Bright blue water-like energy spirals around her in a large circular arc, splashing and glittering with luminous droplets. Set the scene in a weathered dojo or wuguan interior with tall wooden beams, hanging lanterns, broken floorboards, flying splinters, dust, sparks, and debris exploding from the impact of the fight.
